---
title: "Project Overview"
description: |
  <small><i>
    An automated report generated by
    on `r strftime(Sys.Date(), '%b %d, %Y')`
    <a target="_blank" href="https://rave.wiki">RAVE</a>
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: none
params:
  ignore_targets: 
  - "snapshot_subject_3d_viewers"
  - "snapshot_subject_validation"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, collapse = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE, message = FALSE
)

# Load the (forked) pipeline from the current directory
pipeline <- ravepipeline::pipeline_from_path(".")
pipeline_settings <- pipeline$get_settings()
project_name <- pipeline_settings$project_name

read_target <- function(name) {
  if (!is.null(params$ignore_targets) && name %in% params$ignore_targets) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  result_table <- pipeline$result_table
  if (is.null(result_table) || !name %in% result_table$name) {
    return(pipeline$run(name))
  }
  return(pipeline$read(name))
}

format_timestamp <- function(ts) {
  vapply(ts, function(x) {
    tryCatch({
      fmt <- as.POSIXct(x, format = "%y%m%dT%H%M%S", tz = "UTC")
      format(fmt, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    }, error = function(e) x)
  }, "")
}

# Create build directory next to the Rmd (inside the forked pipeline)
build_dir <- file.path(".", "build")
dir.create(build_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: href from report.html to a file inside build/
# (report.html is rendered inside pipeline/, so build/ is at pipeline/build/)
build_href <- function(...) file.path("pipeline", "build", ...)
```

# `r project_name`

*Generated: `r strftime(Sys.time(), usetz = TRUE)`*

---

## Subject Summary

```{r subject_summary}
summary_tbl <- read_target("snapshot_group_subject_summary")
if (is.data.frame(summary_tbl) && nrow(summary_tbl)) {
  DT::datatable(summary_tbl, escape = FALSE, selection = "none",
                class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE))
} else {
  cat("*No subject summary data available.*")
}
```

---

## Module Reports

```{r module_reports_build}
reports <- read_target("snapshot_subject_module_reports")
reports_dir <- file.path(build_dir, "module_reports")

if (!is.null(reports) && length(reports)) {
  rows <- lapply(names(reports), function(sc) {
    manifest <- reports[[sc]]
    if (!is.data.frame(manifest) || !nrow(manifest)) return(NULL)

    # Copy index.html for each report
    link_col <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(manifest)), function(i) {
      src_dir <- dirname(manifest$file_path[[i]])
      src_index <- file.path(src_dir, "index.html")
      if (!file.exists(src_index)) {
        src_index <- manifest$file_path[[i]]
      }
      if (!file.exists(src_index)) return("")

      dest_dir <- file.path(reports_dir, sc, manifest$dir_name[[i]])
      dir.create(dest_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      file.copy(src_index, file.path(dest_dir, "index.html"),
                overwrite = TRUE)

      sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">Open</a>',
              build_href("module_reports", sc, manifest$dir_name[[i]], "index.html"))
    }, "")

    data.frame(
      Subject = sc,
      Module = manifest$module,
      Report = manifest$report_name,
      `Created (YYYY-mm-dd)` = format_timestamp(manifest$timestamp),
      View = link_col,
      check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  combined <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  if (!is.null(combined) && nrow(combined)) {
    rownames(combined) <- NULL
    DT::datatable(combined, escape = FALSE, selection = "none",
                  class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE))
  } else {
    cat("*No module reports found.*")
  }
} else {
  cat("*No module reports data available.*")
}
```

---

## Electrode Coverage

```{r electrode_coverage}
coverage <- read_target("snapshot_group_electrode_coverage")
if (is.data.frame(coverage) && nrow(coverage)) {
  total_col <- match("Total", names(coverage)) - 1L
  sort_order <- if (!is.na(total_col)) list(list(total_col, "desc")) else list()
  DT::datatable(coverage, selection = "none",
                class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE,
                               order = sort_order))
} else {
  cat("*No electrode coverage data available.*")
}
```

---

## 3D Viewers

```{r viewers_build}
viewers_dir <- file.path(build_dir, "3dviewers")
dir.create(viewers_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

group_brain <- read_target("snapshot_group_brain")
if (!is.null(group_brain)) {
  widget <- group_brain$plot()
  invisible(threeBrain::save_brain(
    widget,
    path = file.path(viewers_dir, "group_brain.html"),
    title = paste0(project_name, " - Group Brain")
  ))
}

subject_viewers <- read_target("snapshot_subject_3d_viewers")
if (!is.null(subject_viewers)) {
  for (sc in names(subject_viewers)) {
    brain <- subject_viewers[[sc]]
    if (!is.null(brain)) {
      widget <- brain$plot()
      invisible(threeBrain::save_brain(
        widget,
        path = file.path(viewers_dir, paste0(sc, ".html")),
        title = paste0(project_name, " - ", sc)
      ))
    }
  }
}

html_files <- list.files(viewers_dir, pattern = "\\.html$",
                         full.names = FALSE)
if (length(html_files)) {
  df <- data.frame(
    Name = sub("\\.html$", "", html_files),
    View = vapply(html_files, function(f) {
      sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">Open Viewer</a>', build_href("3dviewers", f))
    }, ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  rownames(df) <- NULL
  DT::datatable(df, escape = FALSE, selection = "none",
                class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 25, dom = "t"))
} else {
  cat("*No 3D viewer data available.*")
}
```

---

## Epoch & References

```{r epoch_references}
meta_summary <- read_target("snapshot_subject_meta_summary")

if (!is.null(meta_summary) && length(meta_summary)) {

  meta_json  <- list()
  table_rows <- list()

  for (sc in names(meta_summary)) {
    tbl <- meta_summary[[sc]]
    if (!is.data.frame(tbl) || !nrow(tbl)) next

    subject <- tryCatch(
      ravecore::new_rave_subject(
        project_name = project_name, subject_code = sc, strict = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    dest_dir <- file.path(build_dir, "metadata", sc)
    dir.create(dest_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(tbl))) {
      type      <- tbl$Type[[i]]
      name      <- tbl$Name[[i]]
      meta_type <- if (tolower(type) == "epoch") "epoch" else "references"
      csv_name  <- sprintf("%s_%s.csv", tolower(type), name)
      key       <- sprintf("%s|%s|%s", sc, type, name)

      data_df <- if (!is.null(subject)) {
        tryCatch(
          subject$meta_data(meta_type = meta_type, meta_name = name),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
      } else NULL

      csv_href <- NULL
      if (is.data.frame(data_df) && nrow(data_df)) {
        utils::write.csv(data_df, file.path(dest_dir, csv_name), row.names = FALSE)
        meta_json[[key]] <- as.list(data_df)
        csv_href <- build_href("metadata", sc, csv_name)
      }

      name_cell <- if (!is.null(csv_href)) {
        sprintf(
          '%s <a href="#" class="rave-meta-view" data-key="%s" style="font-size:0.8em">[view]</a> <a href="%s" download="%s" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.8em">[download]</a>',
          htmltools::htmlEscape(name), key, csv_href, csv_name
        )
      } else {
        htmltools::htmlEscape(name)
      }

      table_rows[[length(table_rows) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
        Subject    = sc,
        Type       = type,
        Name       = name_cell,
        Trials     = tbl$Trials[[i]],
        Conditions = tbl$Conditions[[i]],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
      )
    }
  }

  if (length(table_rows)) {
    combined <- do.call(rbind, table_rows)
    rownames(combined) <- NULL
    json_str <- jsonlite::toJSON(meta_json, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")

    htmltools::tagList(
      htmltools::HTML(sprintf('
<style>
#rave-meta-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%%;height:100%%;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9999;overflow:auto}
#rave-meta-box{background:#fff;margin:60px auto;padding:20px;max-width:90%%;
  border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
  max-height:80vh;overflow:auto;position:relative}
#rave-meta-close{position:absolute;top:8px;right:12px;font-size:1.4em;
  cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;line-height:1}
#rave-meta-box table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%%;font-size:.85em}
#rave-meta-box th,#rave-meta-box td{border:1px solid #dee2e6;padding:4px 8px;white-space:nowrap}
#rave-meta-box th{background:#f8f9fa}
</style>
<div id="rave-meta-overlay">
  <div id="rave-meta-box">
    <button id="rave-meta-close">&times;</button>
    <h5 id="rave-meta-title" style="margin-top:0;margin-right:24px"></h5>
    <div id="rave-meta-content"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
  var _d = %s;
  function esc(s){ return String(s==null?"":s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;"); }
  function show(key){
    var d=_d[key]; if(!d) return;
    var cols=Object.keys(d), n=d[cols[0]].length, html="<table><thead><tr>";
    cols.forEach(function(c){html+="<th>"+esc(c)+"</th>";});
    html+="</tr></thead><tbody>";
    for(var i=0;i<n;i++){html+="<tr>";cols.forEach(function(c){html+="<td>"+esc(d[c][i])+"</td>";});html+="</tr>";}
    html+="</tbody></table>";
    var p=key.split("|");
    document.getElementById("rave-meta-title").textContent=p[0]+" \u2013 "+p[1]+": "+p[2];
    document.getElementById("rave-meta-content").innerHTML=html;
    document.getElementById("rave-meta-overlay").style.display="block";
    document.body.style.overflow="hidden";
  }
  function close_overlay(){
    document.getElementById("rave-meta-overlay").style.display="none";
    document.body.style.overflow="";
  }
  document.getElementById("rave-meta-close").addEventListener("click", close_overlay);
  document.getElementById("rave-meta-overlay").addEventListener("click", function(e){
    if(e.target===this) close_overlay();
  });
  document.addEventListener("click", function(e){
    var el=e.target; while(el&&el.tagName){
      if(el.classList&&el.classList.contains("rave-meta-view")){
        e.preventDefault(); show(el.getAttribute("data-key")); return;
      } el=el.parentElement;
    }
  });
})();
</script>', json_str)),
      DT::datatable(combined, escape = FALSE, selection = "none",
                    class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                    options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE))
    )
  } else {
    cat("*No epoch/reference data found.*")
  }
} else {
  cat("*No epoch/reference data available.*")
}
```

---

## Validation

```{r validation}
validations <- read_target("snapshot_subject_validation")
if (!is.null(validations) && length(validations)) {
  rows <- lapply(names(validations), function(sc) {
    tbl <- validations[[sc]]
    if (!is.data.frame(tbl) || !nrow(tbl)) return(NULL)
    tbl$Subject <- sc
    tbl
  })
  combined <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  if (!is.null(combined) && nrow(combined)) {
    col_order <- c("Subject", setdiff(names(combined), "Subject"))
    combined <- combined[, col_order, drop = FALSE]
    rownames(combined) <- NULL
    DT::datatable(combined, selection = "none",
                  class = "compact stripe", rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE))
  } else {
    cat("*No validation data found.*")
  }
} else {
  cat("*No validation data available.*")
}
```
